home.subtitle: Watch your code run, step by step and learn algorithms intuitively.
home.playgroundDesc: Paste algorithm code or write your own.
home.customCardDesc: Supports JS / TS. Functions and parameters are detected automatically.
home.sortingSub: Explore how different sorting algorithms work step by step.
home.recursionSub: Visualize recursive call flows as a tree.

visualizer.callStackEmpty: Run a step to see the Call Stack
visualizer.variablesEmpty: Run a step to see Variables

custom.hint: 💡 Paste JS / TS code and we'll detect functions and parameters automatically. Enter values and run!

editor.placeholder: Paste or write your code here

selection-sort.name: Selection Sort
selection-sort.description: Finds the smallest element and moves it to the front

insertion-sort.name: Insertion Sort
insertion-sort.description: Inserts each element into its correct position

quick-sort.name: Quick Sort
quick-sort.description: Partitions around a pivot and sorts recursively

merge-sort.name: Merge Sort
merge-sort.description: Divides in half and merges back in order

permutations.name: Permutations
permutations.description: Select r items from n in order

combinations.name: Combinations
combinations.description: Select r items from n without order

subsets.name: Subsets
subsets.description: Find all subsets of the given array

metadata.title: Recursive — Track Your Algorithms
metadata.description: Watch your code run step by step — line highlighting, variable tracking, and call tree visualization.
